summary: brokeragemap.BuildPlan percent-encodes path-param values (url.PathEscape) and BuildDirectPlan percent-encodes query keys/values (url.QueryEscape).
reason: Repo-wide URL-injection sweep: the crypto commands already escape via replacePathParam (url.PathEscape), but the brokerage route builder substituted user-supplied --param path values and --query values raw, so a value with '/' or '..' could collapse into extra path segments or inject query parameters.
validated_outcome: go build/vet/test pass; new TestBuildDirectPlanEscapesReservedChars proves '../evil/segment' and 'a&b=c' are percent-encoded; verify-skill passes.
